                                                                                                                                                                                                            An agent system is provided with a skills library and has tried to solve the task multiple times with a successful solution. Review
                                                                                                                                                                                                            121
                                                                                                                                                                                                            为智能体系统提供一个技能库，且该系统已多次尝试解决任务并获得成功方案。请审查
                                                                                                                                                                                                            122
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            123
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            124
                                                                                                                                                                                                            the task-solving attempt and extract generalizable skills.
                                                                                                                                                                                                            125
                                                                                                                                                                                                            任务解决过程并提取可泛化的技能。
                                                                                                                                                                                                            126
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            127
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            128
                                                                                                                                                                                                            1. Inputs Description
                                                                                                                                                                                                            129
                                                                                                                                                                                                            1. 输入描述
                                                                                                                                                                                                            130
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            131
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            132
                                                                                                                                                                                                            - User Task
                                                                                                                                                                                                            133
                                                                                                                                                                                                            - 用户任务
                                                                                                                                                                                                            134
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            135
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            136
                                                                                                                                                                                                            - Trajectory: A record of an agent's interactions successfully with the environment as it attempts to complete a user task.
                                                                                                                                                                                                            137
                                                                                                                                                                                                            - 轨迹：智能体在尝试完成用户任务时与环境交互的成功记录。
                                                                                                                                                                                                            138
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            139
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            140
                                                                                                                                                                                                            - skills library: A collection of all currently available skills that can be directly reused.
                                                                                                                                                                                                            141
                                                                                                                                                                                                            - 技能库：当前所有可直接复用的可用技能集合。
                                                                                                                                                                                                            142
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            143
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            144
                                                                                                                                                                                                            - Specific-step: Given a concrete step, extract only one reusable skill for the specified step.
                                                                                                                                                                                                            145
                                                                                                                                                                                                            - 特定步骤：针对给定的具体步骤，仅为该步骤提取一个可复用技能。
                                                                                                                                                                                                            146
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            147
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            148
                                                                                                                                                                                                            ## 2. Skill Definition Rule
                                                                                                                                                                                                            149
                                                                                                                                                                                                            ## 2. 技能定义规则
                                                                                                                                                                                                            150
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            151
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            152
                                                                                                                                                                                                            - Skill is a dictionary with four keys: name, document, content and tools.
                                                                                                                                                                                                            153
                                                                                                                                                                                                            - 技能是一个包含四个键的字典：名称（name）、文档（document）、内容（content）和工具（tools）。
                                                                                                                                                                                                            154
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            155
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            156
                                                                                                                                                                                                            &nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;1. name: the skill's name.
                                                                                                                                                                                                            157
                                                                                                                                                                                                            &nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;1. 名称：技能的名称。
                                                                                                                                                                                                            158
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            159
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            160
                                                                                                                                                                                                            &nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;2. document: the skill's functionality, the key parameters, the final output of the skill and any important notes.
                                                                                                                                                                                                            161
                                                                                                                                                                                                            &nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;2. document：技能的功能、关键参数、最终输出以及任何重要说明。
                                                                                                                                                                                                            162
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            163
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            164
                                                                                                                                                                                                            &nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;3. content: the concrete implementation of the skill.
                                                                                                                                                                                                            165
                                                                                                                                                                                                            &nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;3. content：技能的具体实现。
                                                                                                                                                                                                            166
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            167
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            168
                                                                                                                                                                                                            &nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;4. tools: the key tools used in the skill (list).
                                                                                                                                                                                                            169
                                                                                                                                                                                                            &nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;4. tools：技能中使用的关键工具（列表）。
                                                                                                                                                                                                            170
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            171
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            172
                                                                                                                                                                                                            - The skill is abstract, modular, and reusable. Specifically, the skill name must be generic under one application (e.g., spotify
                                                                                                                                                                                                            173
                                                                                                                                                                                                            - 技能应具备抽象性、模块化和可重用性。具体而言，技能名称在应用内必须通用（例如，使用
                                                                                                                                                                                                            174
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            175
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            176
                                                                                                                                                                                                            &nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;get songs by genre instead of get pop songs). The skill must use parameters instead of hard-coded values (e.g.,
                                                                                                                                                                                                            177
                                                                                                                                                                                                            &nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;“按流派获取歌曲”而非“获取流行歌曲”）。技能必须使用参数而非硬编码值（例如，
                                                                                                                                                                                                            178
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            179
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            180
                                                                                                                                                                                                            &nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;specific email address "jay@gmail.com"). The skill body must be self-contained.
                                                                                                                                                                                                            181
                                                                                                                                                                                                            &nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;具体的电子邮件地址“jay@gmail.com”）。技能主体必须是自包含的。
                                                                                                                                                                                                            182
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            183
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            184
                                                                                                                                                                                                            - Explicitly declare the key parameters and the final output data types using type hints. Example: Parameters: param:
                                                                                                                                                                                                            185
                                                                                                                                                                                                            - 使用类型提示明确声明关键参数和最终输出的数据类型。示例：Parameters: param:
                                                                                                                                                                                                            186
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            187
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            188
                                                                                                                                                                                                            &nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;str; Outputs: output: list[dict]:
                                                                                                                                                                                                            189
                                                                                                                                                                                                            &nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;str; Outputs: output: list[dict]：
                                                                                                                                                                                                            190
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            191
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            192
                                                                                                                                                                                                            - Include a detailed description of the skill with input and output explanation.
                                                                                                                                                                                                            193
                                                                                                                                                                                                            - 包含技能的详细描述，并解释输入和输出。
                                                                                                                                                                                                            194
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            195
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            196
                                                                                                                                                                                                            - The skill should not be similar to the existing skills in the skills library.
                                                                                                                                                                                                            197
                                                                                                                                                                                                            - 技能不应与技能库中现有的技能相似。
                                                                                                                                                                                                            198
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            199
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            200
                                                                                                                                                                                                            - The skill must involve multiple processing steps. Simply using the result of an API call without additional logic does not
                                                                                                                                                                                                            201
                                                                                                                                                                                                            - 技能必须包含多个处理步骤。仅使用 API 调用结果而无额外逻辑的
                                                                                                                                                                                                            202
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            203
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            204
                                                                                                                                                                                                            &nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;qualify as a valid skill.
                                                                                                                                                                                                            205
                                                                                                                                                                                                            &nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;操作不符合有效技能的定义。
                                                                                                                                                                                                            206
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            207
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            208
                                                                                                                                                                                                            - Never call other skills from the skills library or any previously defined skills.
                                                                                                                                                                                                            209
                                                                                                                                                                                                            - 严禁调用技能库中的其他技能或任何先前定义的技能。
                                                                                                                                                                                                            210
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            211
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            212
                                                                                                                                                                                                            - Do not import any Python packages.
                                                                                                                                                                                                            213
                                                                                                                                                                                                            - 不要导入任何 Python 包。
                                                                                                                                                                                                            214
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            215
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            216
                                                                                                                                                                                                            - Avoid a functional style; there's no need to use return.
                                                                                                                                                                                                            217
                                                                                                                                                                                                            - 避免使用函数式风格；无需使用 return。
                                                                                                                                                                                                            218
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            219
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            220
                                                                                                                                                                                                            ## 3. Update Existing Skills
                                                                                                                                                                                                            221
                                                                                                                                                                                                            ## 3. 更新现有技能
                                                                                                                                                                                                            222
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            223
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            224
                                                                                                                                                                                                            Your goal is to ensure the system retains actionable skills that help it behave correctly in the future.
                                                                                                                                                                                                            225
                                                                                                                                                                                                            你的目标是确保系统保留可操作的技能，以帮助其在未来正确执行任务。
                                                                                                                                                                                                            226
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            227
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            228
                                                                                                                                                                                                            You have three options: [modify, add, keep]
                                                                                                                                                                                                            229
                                                                                                                                                                                                            你有三个选项：[modify（修改）, add（添加）, keep（保留）]
                                                                                                                                                                                                            230
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            231
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            232
                                                                                                                                                                                                            - modify: revise an existing skill to make it more effective (e.g., improving documents). Only change content when necessary,
                                                                                                                                                                                                            233
                                                                                                                                                                                                            - modify：修订现有技能以提高其有效性（例如改进文档）。仅在必要时更改内容，
                                                                                                                                                                                                            234
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            235
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            236
                                                                                                                                                                                                            &nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;and ensure the resulting skill remains broadly reusable/general-purpose.
                                                                                                                                                                                                            237
                                                                                                                                                                                                            &nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;并确保生成的技能保持广泛的可重用性/通用性。
                                                                                                                                                                                                            238
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            239
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            240
                                                                                                                                                                                                            - add: introduce a new skill only when existing skills cannot support a critical step, in order to improve future performance.
                                                                                                                                                                                                            241
                                                                                                                                                                                                            - add：仅在现有技能无法支持关键步骤时引入新技能，以提升未来表现。
                                                                                                                                                                                                            242
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            243
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            244
                                                                                                                                                                                                            - keep: Preserve the skill unchanged when there are no clear issues.
                                                                                                                                                                                                            245
                                                                                                                                                                                                            - keep：当没有明显问题时，保持技能不变。
                                                                                                                                                                                                            246
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            247
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            248
                                                                                                                                                                                                            Common actions:
                                                                                                                                                                                                            249
                                                                                                                                                                                                            常见操作：
                                                                                                                                                                                                            250
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            251
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            252
                                                                                                                                                                                                            - add a new skill
                                                                                                                                                                                                            253
                                                                                                                                                                                                            - 添加新技能
                                                                                                                                                                                                            254
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            255
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            256
                                                                                                                                                                                                            - update a skill's usage instructions/documentation
                                                                                                                                                                                                            257
                                                                                                                                                                                                            - 更新技能的使用说明/文档
                                                                                                                                                                                                            258
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            259
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            260
                                                                                                                                                                                                            - revise a skill's variable/parameter definitions to make it more generalizable
                                                                                                                                                                                                            261
                                                                                                                                                                                                            - 修订技能的变量/参数定义，使其更具通用性
                                                                                                                                                                                                            262
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            263
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            264
                                                                                                                                                                                                            - if a skill is overly complex, refactor it into more modular skills (involving both modify and add)
                                                                                                                                                                                                            265
                                                                                                                                                                                                            - 如果技能过于复杂，将其重构为更模块化的技能（涉及 modify 和 add）
                                                                                                                                                                                                            266
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            267
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            268
                                                                                                                                                                                                            - keep a skill unchanged
                                                                                                                                                                                                            269
                                                                                                                                                                                                            - 保持技能不变
                                                                                                                                                                                                            270
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            271
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            272
                                                                                                                                                                                                            ---
                                                                                                                                                                                                            273
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            274
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            275
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            276
                                                                                                                                                                                                            4. Requirements for each skill that is modified or added.
                                                                                                                                                                                                            277
                                                                                                                                                                                                            4. 对每个修改或添加的技能的要求。
                                                                                                                                                                                                            278
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            279
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            280
                                                                                                                                                                                                            - Avoid duplication: If a skills library is provided, do not add new skills that are similar to existing ones—use keep or modify instead.
                                                                                                                                                                                                            281
                                                                                                                                                                                                            - 避免重复：如果提供了技能库，请勿添加与现有技能相似的新技能——应使用 keep 或 modify。
                                                                                                                                                                                                            282
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            283
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            284
                                                                                                                                                                                                            - Exclude non-solution behavior: Do not include capability exploration, debugging activities, or any failed/incorrect steps.
                                                                                                                                                                                                            285
                                                                                                                                                                                                            - 排除非解决方案行为：不要包含能力探索、调试活动或任何失败/错误的步骤。
                                                                                                                                                                                                            286
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            287
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            288
                                                                                                                                                                                                            - Ensure domain specificity: The skill must reference domain-specific libraries/APIs, e.g., \{api\}.
                                                                                                                                                                                                            289
                                                                                                                                                                                                            - 确保领域特定性：技能必须引用特定领域的库/API，例如 {{api}}。
                                                                                                                                                                                                            290
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            291
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            292
                                                                                                                                                                                                            - Avoid over-wrapping: Verify the implementation is not merely a thin wrapper around another skill (i.e., not just calling a single underlying skill without meaningful additional logic).
                                                                                                                                                                                                            293
                                                                                                                                                                                                            - 避免过度封装：确保实现不仅仅是对另一个技能的简单包装（即：在没有实质性额外逻辑的情况下，仅调用单一底层技能）。
                                                                                                                                                                                                            294
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            295
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            296
                                                                                                                                                                                                            - Specific-step guided extraction: Only focus on the specified step in the trajectory when extracting skills.
                                                                                                                                                                                                            297
                                                                                                                                                                                                            - 特定步骤引导提取：提取技能时，仅关注轨迹中指定的步骤。
                                                                                                                                                                                                            298
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            299
                                                                                                                                                                                                            

                                                                                                                                                                                                            300
                                                                                                                                                                                                            ## 5. Good Skill Example
